title: vicia cassubica subsp. orobus
intro: Vicia cassubica subsp. orobus, also known as the lesser bird's foot trefoil, is a plant species that belongs to the pea family and is native to Europe. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Vicia cassubica subsp. orobus include its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
